ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., ISO 639-1) */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family (e.g., Indo-European, Sino-Tibetan) */,
  "language_script" TEXT /* Script used to write the language (e.g., Latin, Cyrillic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language the word belongs to */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of the word (orthographic representation) */,
  "ipa" TEXT /* IPA transcription of the word */,
  "gloss" TEXT /* Gloss (meaning) of the word */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* Etymology of the word */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts_of_speech" (
  "part_of_speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part of speech */,
  "part_of_speech_name" TEXT /* Name of the part of speech */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part of speech */,
  "subcategories" TEXT /* Subcategories of the part of speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_of_speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_pos" (
  "word_pos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word-part of speech association */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "part_of_speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part of speech */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_pos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_pos_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_pos_part_of_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_of_speech_id") REFERENCES parts_of_speech ("part_of_speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word variation */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of variation (e.g., inflectional, derivational) */,
  "variation_form" TEXT /* Form of the word variation */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_variations_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inflectional_variations" (
  "inflectional_variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inflectional variation */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word variation */,
  "inflectional_feature" TEXT /* Inflectional feature (e.g., tense, case, number) */,
  "inflectional_form" TEXT /* Inflectional form of the word variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inflectional_variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inflectional_variations_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES word_variations ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derivational_variations" (
  "derivational_variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derivational variation */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word variation */,
  "derivational_feature" TEXT /* Derivational feature (e.g., prefix, suffix) */,
  "derivational_form" TEXT /* Derivational form of the word variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derivational_variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derivational_variations_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES word_variations ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the word */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the word was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word relationship */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "related_word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related word */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., synonymy, hyponymy) */,
  "relationship_strength" REAL /* Strength of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_relationships_related_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_relationships_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_senses" (
  "sense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word sense */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "sense_type" TEXT /* Type of sense (e.g., literal, figurative) */,
  "sense_description" TEXT /* Description of the word sense */,
  "sense_example" TEXT /* Example of the word sense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_senses_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_expressions" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word expression */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "expression_type" TEXT /* Type of expression (e.g., idiomatic, phrasal) */,
  "expression_description" TEXT /* Description of the word expression */,
  "expression_example" TEXT /* Example of the word expression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_expressions_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collocations" (
  "collocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collocation */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "collocating_word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collocating word */,
  "collocation_type" TEXT /* Type of collocation (e.g., co-occurrence, frequency) */,
  "collocation_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the collocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collocations_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collocations_collocating_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("collocating_word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "register_description" TEXT /* Description of the register */,
  "register_example" TEXT /* Example of the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_example" TEXT /* Example of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dialects" (
  "dialect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dialect */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "dialect_name" TEXT /* Name of the dialect */,
  "dialect_description" TEXT /* Description of the dialect */,
  "dialect_example" TEXT /* Example of the dialect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dialect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialects_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "style_example" TEXT /* Example of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_styles_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word version */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_versions_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
